instruction: Questions 11–12 and 13–14: Choose TWO A–E. Questions 15–20: Choose A, B or C.

questions.prompt: Which TWO warnings does Dan give about picking mushrooms?

options.label: Don't pick more than one variety of mushroom at a time.
Don't pick mushrooms near busy roads.
Don't eat mushrooms given to you.
Don't eat mushrooms while picking them.
Don't pick old mushrooms.

questions.explanation: Không gần đường (B) và không ăn khi hái (C).

questions.prompt: Which TWO warnings does Dan give about picking mushrooms?

options.label: Don't pick more than one variety of mushroom at a time.
Don't pick mushrooms near busy roads.
Don't eat mushrooms given to you.
Don't eat mushrooms while picking them.
Don't pick old mushrooms.

questions.explanation: Không gần đường (B) và không ăn khi hái (C). (cặp 11–12)

questions.prompt: Which TWO ideas about wild mushrooms does Dan say are correct?

options.label: Mushrooms should always be peeled before eating.
Mushrooms eaten by animals may be unsafe.
Cooking destroys toxins in mushrooms.
Brightly coloured mushrooms can be edible.
All poisonous mushrooms have a bad smell.

questions.explanation: Động vật ăn không an toàn (B) và màu sáng có thể ăn được (D).

questions.prompt: Which TWO ideas about wild mushrooms does Dan say are correct?

options.label: Mushrooms should always be peeled before eating.
Mushrooms eaten by animals may be unsafe.
Cooking destroys toxins in mushrooms.
Brightly coloured mushrooms can be edible.
All poisonous mushrooms have a bad smell.

questions.explanation: Động vật ăn không an toàn (B) và màu sáng có thể ăn được (D). (cặp 13–14)

questions.prompt: What advice does Dan give about picking mushrooms in parks?

options.label: Choose wooded areas.
Don't disturb wildlife.
Get there early.

questions.sectionInstruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.prompt: Dan says it is a good idea for beginners to

options.label: use a mushroom app.
join a group.
take a reference book.

questions.prompt: What does Dan say is important for conservation?

options.label: selecting only fully grown mushrooms
picking a limited amount of mushrooms
avoiding areas where rare mushroom species grow

questions.prompt: According to Dan, some varieties of wild mushrooms are in decline because there is

options.label: a huge demand for them from restaurants.
a lack of rain in this part of the country.
a rise in building developments locally.

questions.prompt: Dan says that when storing mushrooms, people should

options.label: keep them in the fridge for no more than two days.
keep them in a brown bag in a dark room.
leave them for a period after washing them.

questions.prompt: What does Dan say about trying new varieties of mushrooms?

options.label: Experiment with different recipes.
Expect some to have a strong taste.
Cook them for a long time.
